TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-frog_Adus

S.FORM: aiza andii a sia bunun a hai sadu s asu mas a sisiuh.
S.TRANSL: 在那裡有一個小孩看著狗和青蛙。
There was a small boy looking at a dog and a frog.

S.FORM: sia aiza pan an dangian sia danum a alipua s asu ingadah a sisiuh a.
S.TRANSL: 狗照顧一個裝水的瓶子裡面的青蛙。
The dog is keeping a frog in a bottle.

S.FORM: at adii amin uvaaz a sadu.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩也一直看（青蛙）。
The boy is also looking at the frog.

S.FORM: at aiza adii a kucu a.
S.TRANSL: 那裡有鞋子。
There were shoes.

S.FORM: at minnadii hai masabah a uvaaz a alibaan a asu a.
S.TRANSL: 到了這裡小孩就抱著狗睡了。
Here (on this page), the boy is holding the dog while sleeping.

S.FORM: ung at mun‘apav adii a sisiuh a.
S.TRANSL: 然後那隻青蛙就跑出去了。
Then the frog runs away.

S.FORM: at minnatasipal in dii hai masabah ang a uvaaz at nii asu a.
S.TRANSL: 到了下一頁，小孩還在睡，但是狗沒有。
On this page, the boy iss still sleeping, but the dog isn’t.

S.FORM: at uka ang sisiuh a ingadah ang saia pan cia.
S.TRANSL: 然後青蛙還沒有（在這裡），他是不是還在瓶子裡面？
Then the frog is gone. Is it still inside the bottle?

S.FORM: ingadah ang pan mai nii ai na ingadah sia kucu cia.
S.TRANSL: 是不是還在瓶子裡？不是的話，那麼會在鞋子裡面。
Is it still in the bottle? If not, then it must be in the shoes.

S.FORM: maupa cia saia.
S.TRANSL: 他就那樣。
It’s like that.

S.FORM: at minnadiip in hai inkaduan in a sia sisiuh a tu na ingadah saia sia sapil cia pahasia ansahanun saicia.
S.TRANSL: 然後這裡呢，（孩子以為）青蛙會在鞋子裡面，可以找到青蛙，所以他把鞋子搬起來。
Then here, (the boy thingks) the frog might be in the shoes and maybe he will find the frog, so he lifts the shoes.

S.FORM: at aupa minnadiip in hai idiip in saia malala’la kikilim tu isa munpungav.
S.TRANSL: 然後這裡呢，他在這裡一直喊叫一直找說：「在哪裡走丟呢？」
Until here, he keeps on shouting and looking: “Where did you go?”

S.FORM: isuka adii sisiuh a.
S.TRANSL: 那隻青蛙消失了。
That frog disappeared!

S.FORM: at kaupa s asu cia malmangha amin asu malala’la.
S.TRANSL: 然後只有狗在往上看，並且一直叫著。
Then there’s only the dog looking up and calling for it.

S.FORM: isia lumah hai kui uka.
S.TRANSL: 家裡也沒有，該怎麼辦！
It’s not in the house. What should we do?

S.FORM: at adii a asu ka ingadah amin sia pan.
S.TRANSL: 然後那隻狗也就到瓶子裡面。
Then the dog also got into the bottle.

S.FORM: at adii a uvaaz a isia siul lumah malmamangdav mastatala.
S.TRANSL: 那個孩子在窗口往下望著，一直等待著。
The boy kept on looking down from the window and waiting.

S.FORM: at minsuma asu a hai damuun saicia sikaput.
S.TRANSL: 然後狗也來，他把狗抓起抱緊。
Then the dog also came. He held it tightly.

S.FORM: at uka ang a sisiuh.
S.TRANSL: 然後還是沒有青蛙。
But there was still no trace of the frog.

S.FORM: a na aiza aupa tu dudusa.
S.TRANSL: 是不是會有兩個？ [孩子跟狗]
Are there two of them? [boy and dog]

S.FORM: at minnadii dii an hai malala’la ang mudaan naia amin maisinalumah.
S.TRANSL: 然後到了這裡呢，他們還在叫喊著，一邊從家裡出去。
Here, they were still calling and leaving the house.

S.FORM: tandudusa asu cia malala’la kikilim.
S.TRANSL: 兩個人一邊一起走著，一邊叫喊，一邊找尋。
The two of them went together, calling out loud and looking around.

S.FORM: uka at usadua s pahusaz tu aiza idii pahusaz a isia libus a isia lukis malkazingking.
S.TRANSL: 沒有。然後他們在樹林裡看得到有虎頭蜂窩掛在樹上。
It was not there. Then in the forest they saw there was a hornet nest on the tree.

S.FORM: minkakalapat a asu a asa mau s pahusaz cia.
S.TRANSL: 狗一直想要爬上去吃虎頭蜂。
The dog wanted to climb up the whole time to eat the hornet nest.

S.FORM: masisivit a dii a ingadah cia sisiuh hai.
S.TRANSL: 他一直看青蛙是不是在裡面。
He kept on looking if the frog was inside.

S.FORM: at maz a asu a hai asa mau s pahusaz cia.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗想要吃虎頭蜂。
That dog wants to eat the hornets.

S.FORM: hai miku in a mapising a uvaaz a hai mais cinhaiap hai na kasinapun.
S.TRANSL: 孩子害怕，如果突然知道，被追了要怎麼辦。
But the child was afraid. What should he do if he is chased since it suddenly knows?

S.FORM: maz a asu hai nii tu mapising malkalapat tu asa maun.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗不怕，繼續往上看，想要吃。
That dog was not afraid, staying there and looking up, eager to eat.

S.FORM: at aupa a dii a at adii hai sibuzbuzun sihalhalun hai ka makbina cinsivus in amin a a dii a tu maz ang a na kaunun ta s pahusaz cia hai askadii sia lumah tu halhalun mun‘apav maupa tia.
S.TRANSL: 因為那個被拉掉下來... 看吧！他們突然都轉頭，那些要吃我們的虎頭蜂，就從牠們掉下來的家出來了。
It was pulled down… Look, suddenly they all turned their heads — those hornets that would eat us were just coming out from the nest which had dropped down.

S.FORM: ai minnadii masisinap minnadii sia bunun cia hai na mikua saia.
S.TRANSL: （他們）追他追到那去了。他怎麼辦呢？
(They) chased the person till there. What could he do?

S.FORM: na tunghabin saia sia libus cia sian sinluum.
S.TRANSL: 他會躲在那個森林？還是這裡會有牆壁嗎？
Would he hide in that forest? Was there a wall?

S.FORM: lukis tunghabin saia ngadah cia.
S.TRANSL: 他躲在那棵樹裡面。
He hides inside that tree.

S.FORM: na sinapu s pahusaz cia.
S.TRANSL: 他會被虎頭蜂追。
He would be chased by the hornets.

S.FORM: mapising amin dii a malala’la mastatala tu isa bi s imita cina.
S.TRANSL: 大家害怕，一邊等待一邊大叫：「媽媽到底在哪裡？」
Everybody was afraid over there and kept waiting and screaming “where is our mom?”

S.FORM: sinapun a asu hai aupa maihalhal.
S.TRANSL: 狗被追，是因為牠弄掉了（虎頭蜂窩）。
The dog was chased because he had taken down (the hornet).

S.FORM: mmm kaz a uvaaz a ka ma bi s kandundah saitan a dii ai.
S.TRANSL: 然後孩子，是誰踢的呢？
As for the children, who kicked him?

S.FORM: mmm hai ma bi s kandundah.
S.TRANSL: 是誰踢的？
Who had kicked it?

S.FORM: mmm ithuu tan.
S.TRANSL: 是貓頭鷹吧？
It was the owl, right?

S.FORM: kandundaha s ithuu cia.
S.TRANSL: 是被貓頭鷹踢的，是吧？
It was kicked by the owl, right?

S.FORM: at minnadii askadiip amin minduav kananu dii a mapa’ia bungu tu na mikua mais minsuma pahusaz ka.
S.TRANSL: 然後所以年輕人從那邊去那邊，盡量在那裡擋住頭。如果虎頭蜂來的話要怎麼辦？所以這樣。
Then all the young people went there and tried their best to cover their head. How would it be if the hornets came? Just this way.

S.FORM: malala’la ang a saia hai kui uka at aiz in a hanvang tu ngabul mun’apav a hanvang a tu.
S.TRANSL: 她一直叫著，但還是沒有，然後有了水鹿的鹿角，水鹿出現了。
He was still calling but still it wasn’t there. Then it was deer’s antlers — the deer came out.

S.FORM: na mindangaz saicin.
S.TRANSL: 牠會幫助他嗎？
Will it help him?

S.FORM: at minnadii hai kui itasipal in asu a.
S.TRANSL: 然後已經到對面的狗怎麼到的呢？
Then how would the dog that is already on the other side get there?

S.FORM: idadaza saia sia ludun.
S.TRANSL: 他在山上。
He is in the mountain.

S.FORM: aiza ngabul a malala’la mas sisiuh.
S.TRANSL: 有一隻鹿，一直叫著青蛙。
There was a deer, it keeps on calling a frog.

S.FORM: mmm lala’lau s saicia sisiuh tu minsumaa hai ka uka minsusuma.
S.TRANSL: 他一直叫那個青蛙：「來吧！」但一直沒有來。
It kept calling the frog: “Come!” But still he didn’t come.

S.FORM: at askadiip in sia ngabul a mamama s uvaaz.
S.TRANSL: 然後，鹿背著孩子。
Then there, the deer carried the child on its back.

S.FORM: askadii asu a kikilim sia ismuut hai ka uka sia lukis hai uka at.
S.TRANSL: 到了那邊，狗在草裡找，沒有；他在樹上找，沒有。
The dog got there and looked on the grass, but it wasn’t there; on the tree, but it wasn’t there.

S.FORM: minnasain cia at aiz in a adii a hazam a dadusa sinuk a maisinuk hazam hai.
S.TRANSL: 到那邊有了兩隻鳥和巢，空巢。
To there, there were two birds and a nest, an empty nest.

S.FORM: ung at minnadii hai ka undusaan in a uvaaz a mas asu maltatakzang tu.
S.TRANSL: 然後，孩子和狗兩個一起躺著。
Then, the child and the dog lay down together.

S.FORM: adii hanvang a malsisivit tu na ciu.
S.TRANSL: 那隻鹿一直觀察他們是否被救。
That deer kept seeing if they were saved.

S.FORM: at ka masasiahu tu ka asu a anbunguun saicia ciu at.
S.TRANSL: 然後，相反，小狗被他頂在頭上救。
Then, on the contrary, the dog was saved by being held on his head.

S.FORM: uka ang a sisiuh mun‘apav.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙還沒出來。
The frog still hadn’t come out yet.

S.FORM: mmm na minnasia andii maz an sisiuh mun‘apav.
S.TRANSL: 到了這裡，青蛙出來嗎？
Here, did the frog come out?

S.FORM: minnadii hai mun'apav a asu sia danum hai tupau s saicia tu kaa tu pataliva na aiza sisiuh.
S.TRANSL: 到這裡，狗從水出來，他叫狗不要出聲，會有青蛙。
Here, the dog came out from the water and it was told not to speak because there would be frogs.

S.FORM: at aupa minnadii hai mun‘apav a asu a at na si’apav saia sisiuh adii.
S.TRANSL: 到那裡，狗出現。他會不會把青蛙拉出來？
Then here (on this page), the dog came out. Would it pull out frogs there?

S.FORM: mmm adii masisivit tu na minsuma sisiuh.
S.TRANSL: 他那邊一直看青蛙來了沒。
He kept looking over there, wondering if the frog would appear.

S.FORM: at tupau s adii ta asu a tu pataliva kaa tu lulunglung tu’ia.
S.TRANSL: 然後他叫狗不要汪汪地吠或嗥叫。
Then he told the dog not to bark or howl.

S.FORM: at minnadiip in hai tuza tu adiip in at sisiuh a undusaan.
S.TRANSL: 這裡，真的有兩隻青蛙在一起。
Then here, there were really two frogs together.

S.FORM: at manaskal in naia tu aiz in a sian.
S.TRANSL: 他們很開心有了他。
They were happy that here it was.

S.FORM: at aupa minnadiip in naia kudadaza in sia lukis saia at.
S.TRANSL: 然後，他們到木頭上面了。
Then there, they went on the wood.

S.FORM: manaskal in naia ka supah ang asia saia s uvaaz tas’an mazmaz ka supah.
S.TRANSL: 他們高興了，因為他和孩子，兄弟姊妹之類的很多在那邊。
They became very happy because he and many children, siblings and the like were there.

S.FORM: mmm adii cia aupa dinamu naicia tu cina at.
S.TRANSL: 他們那裡就抓他們的母親。
There then they grabbed their mother.

S.FORM: kasu pah a maupa uvaaz a tama adii a asia tu tama cina tama.
S.TRANSL: 爸爸媽媽有了很多很多那樣的孩子。
The father and mother had so many children.

S.FORM: mmm maupa cia tu maupa cia hai.
S.TRANSL: 這樣那樣的。
Like this, like that.

S.FORM: na mudaan in naia antabanun a tasa mas asu cia hai.
S.TRANSL: 他們準備要走了，他們一個被狗帶走。
They were leaving, the dog took one away.

S.FORM: na sidahda in hai.
S.TRANSL: 他們要遠離。
They were leaving far off.

S.FORM: andii kusunun a sisiuh mudaan.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙被提著走。
The frog left while being held.

S.FORM: pangausun a asu a.
S.TRANSL: 狗被叫到前面。
The dog was made to walk in front.

S.FORM: kaupa cia.
S.TRANSL: 講完了。
That’s it.
